name: kbot DJ FX
description: One-knob DJ performance effects: Filter sweep, Echo freeze, Reverb wash, Stutter, Brake/Riser. Kill button resets all.
author: kernel.chat

installation.instructions: Drop onto any audio track or master. Each dial is a one-knob macro. Kill button resets all effects instantly.

Echo.description: Tempo-synced delay with feedback. High = freeze.

Wash.description: Reverb from dry to infinite wash

Kill.description: Panic button — resets all effects to clean

effects.name: Filter
effects.description: DJ-style LP/HP sweep with resonance peak at extremes

effects.name: Echo
effects.description: Tempo-synced delay, ramps to echo freeze at max

effects.name: Wash
effects.description: Reverb from tight room to infinite wash

effects.name: Brake/Riser
effects.description: Vinyl brake or filtered noise build

messages.kill: Reset all effects to clean state
